title: rubus chlorophyllus
intro: Rubus chlorophyllus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Red Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Rubus chlorophyllus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
